    I'M NEW

    Living Savior's Mission is to know the love of Christ and serve God so that the Holy Spirit may work through us to bring others to Christ.

    Preschool

    We believe that Living Savior Preschool can expand the child's perception of God, of other people, and of the physical world in which God has placed us.

Bible Studies

Women in Prayer Bible Study

Tuesday Mornings

9:30am

Women in Prayer has resumed with the study of Beth Moore’s “Daniel: Lives of Integrity, Words of Prophecy.” They meet every Tuesday at 9:30 AM in the Narthex. New members, drop-in visitors and guests are always welcomed. Childcare available as needed. Contact Nancy Klein or the church office at 703-352-1421 for more information.

Living Savior Prayer Chain

TBD

Prayer Circle

TBD

Home Group Bible Study

Sundays

1:00pm

The Home Group Bible Study meets the 1st Sunday of each month from 1-3PM. Come for food, fellowship and study of the Bible. We rotate home hosts each month. Bring a dish to share and your Bibles!

LifeLight Bible Study

Wednesdays, During School Months

12:30pm

Lifelight is an in-depth bible study group that meets on Wednesdays at 12:30 PM in the Narthex during the school year. They are studying the book of Acts, led by Donna Dietz. They begin at 12:30 PM with an optional social time of dessert and coffee followed by the study from 1- 2:30 PM. They would love to see you there and welcome new members at any time! Please contact Terri Beam or the church office at 703-352-1421 with any questions.
